arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta full of passion and pride as he bangs the drum but now Arsenal must hit the right notes against PSG with trophy clock ticking
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: After Liverpool's day in the sun and Manchester City booking their annual place in the FA Cup final, it now feels like Arsenal's turn.

arts.ttl: Deadly Desire Doue will put Mikel Arteta and Arsenal on red alert... nullifying one of Europe's hottest properties must be a priority
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: His surname translates as 'gifted' and Desire Doue is certainly living up to the billing.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta urges fans to be Arsenal's extra man in seismic Champions League semi-final against Paris Saint-Germain
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has called on Arsenal's fans to create the Emirates' best-ever atmosphere tonight to help the club reach a first Champions League final in nearly 20 years. They face PSG in the semi-finals.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Martinelli makes PSG admission as he seeks to extend amazing Arsenal record
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli is set to play a key role for Arsenal as they host PSG in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final on Tuesday, with the Brazilian adding to the pressure on his side

arts.ttl: Spirited Mikel Arteta urges Arsenal fans to ‘bring their boots’ against PSG
arts.sum: Manager said club ‘feel’ lack of Champions League trophy Mikel Merino could replace Thomas Partey in midfield Mikel Arteta has told the Arsenal support to “bring your boots” and a can-do attitude for the Champions League semi-final first-leg at home against Paris Saint-Germain on Tuesday night, as he radiated conviction that the club was primed to make history. The manager described the game as the biggest of his career and one of the most significant hosted by the Emirates Stadium, which opened for the 2006-07 season. It is Arsenal’s third appearance in the last four of Europe’s elite competition, after the victory against Villarreal in 2005-06 and the defeat by Manchester United in 2008-09. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. PSG: 4 Key Battles That Could Decide Champions League Semifinal
arts.sum: Arsenal's first leg clash with Paris Saint-Germain in the semifinals of the Champions League is likely to be decided by the finest of margins.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe PSG record could be broken by 32-goal sensation in Arsenal Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembele could break a Paris Saint-Germain record set by Kylian Mbappe when Les Parisiens face Arsenal in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives triple Arsenal injury update and delivers Champions League rallying cry before PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta provides the latest on three of Arsenal's injured troops ahead of Tuesday's Champions League semi-final first leg showdown with Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Arsenal-PSG Combined XI: Donnarumma or Raya? Neves or Ødegaard? Barcola or Saka?
arts.sum: Arsenal host Paris Saint-Germain tomorrow night at the Emirates Stadium for the first leg of their Champions League semi-final. Ahead of the game, Get French Football News decided to put…

arts.ttl: Arteta urges Arsenal to 'live the moment' vs. PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta said Arsenal are feeling the weight of history, but urged his players to "live the moment" as they attempt to reach the Champions League final.
